title: Awarded an IEEE/IFIP DSN 2026 Student Travel Grant — supporting travel to present “DRIFT: Drift-Resilient Invariant-Feature Transformer for DGA Detection” at the conference in Charlotte, North Carolina. Chaeyoung Lee and I were each selected by the DSN’26 Student Travel Grant Committee, co-chaired by Meera Sridhar and Domenico Cotroneo.
Successfully registered the new custom domain, chaeri.net.
Officially launched my personal portfolio website.
Our paper “DRIFT: Drift-Resilient Invariant-Feature Transformer for DGA Detection” (Chaeyoung Lee and Chaeri Jung, equal contribution) has received final acceptance for IEEE/IFIP DSN’26.
